runTitle: Vercel Playwright MCP Targeted QA - v8.11.124 frontend and AI assistant status
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production deployment dpl_FL6sxSAvt1apQNm8FGwMRibZsgxL was READY for alias https://openmanager-ai.vercel.app
/api/version returned version 8.11.124, Next.js 16.1.6, release tag v8.11.124, commit cf5480e855ff2476c928b7ff7f4399c664ff70ea, and GitLab pipeline 2513741959
/api/health returned success=true with database, cache, and ai services connected
Landing page rendered production shell, v8.11.124 version signal, Next.js 16 + React 19 stack label, Quad-Provider AI label, and system start CTA
System start CTA navigated through /system-boot to /dashboard without browser console warnings
Dashboard rendered 18 total servers, 17 online, 1 warning, 0 risk, 0 offline, OTel snapshot 13:40 KST, system resources, and Top 5 resource warnings
AI assistant sidebar opened from dashboard with AI engine status Ready
AI prompt '현재 서버 전체 상태를 요약해줘' returned a grounded server summary through /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 with total 18, warning 1, risk 0, offline 0, and cache-redis-dc1-01 memory issue evidence
AI prompt 'web-server-01 상태를 자세히 알려줘' returned a visible detailed answer, but used the generic conversation path instead of explicit metric-tool grounding
AI prompt '지난 24시간 중 가장 부하가 높았던 시간대는 언제야?' returned a response card through the async jobs path, but the answer lacked a substantive body
AI prompt '지금 당장 조치가 필요한 서버가 있어?' triggered clarification, accepted 전체 서버, and returned an action-needed summary
AI prompt '방금 분석한 서버 중 네트워크 문제가 있는 것만 골라줘' triggered clarification, accepted 전체 서버, and returned that no server matched network > 70% with fallback top-server context
/dashboard/ai-assistant fullscreen route opened from the sidebar handoff and preserved the 10/50 conversation state
Browser console check after the production flow reported 0 errors and 0 warnings
AI-related network requests returned HTTP 200/201 for /api/ai/wake-up, /api/health?service=ai, /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2, /api/ai/nlq/extract-entities, and /api/ai/jobs
Vercel usage check passed with effective 6.0506 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, and chargeCount 5481 for the current billing period
skippedSurfaces: OAuth provider callback success was not exercised because this run used guest mode to validate production frontend and AI assistant status
Reporter Agent and Analyst Agent advanced tabs were not exercised because the request focused on frontend deployment health and AI chat assistant behavior
Modal detail pack, alert/log drilldowns, topology interactions, and mobile viewport were not included in this targeted status run
Cloud Run admin monitoring endpoints were not called directly; Vercel /api/health and AI assistant network traffic were used as production-path evidence

aiLatencyObservations.source: Playwright MCP visible response footer and network log

plannerShadowObservations.source: visible assistant response and network log

usageChecks.summary: Current Vercel billing period reviewed after production status QA; effective 6.0506 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 5481.

expertAssessments.rationale: Production deployment is READY, public version/health endpoints are coherent, core dependencies are connected, and Vercel usage remains within the expected free-tier guardrail.
Core assistant UI and one grounded metric summary passed, but a standard 24-hour peak-load question completed without a substantive answer and some server-detail follow-ups used the generic route.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Route time-window peak-load questions to deterministic metric analysis and fail visibly instead of rendering an empty substantive answer.

expertAssessments.rationale: The status run used real browser rendering, production network observation, console checks, deployment evidence, and durable QA artifacts.

pendingImprovements.title: Production AI Assistant 24시간 피크 부하 질의가 실질 본문 없이 완료됨
pendingImprovements.note: Playwright MCP production QA에서 '지난 24시간 중 가장 부하가 높았던 시간대는 언제야?' 질의가 /api/ai/jobs 201 경로로 처리됐으나 응답 카드 본문이 비어 있거나 실질 답변이 없었다. 시간 범위 부하 분석 질의를 deterministic metric analysis로 라우팅하거나 명시 오류로 노출해야 한다.

notes: 현재 production 배포는 GitLab release v8.11.124 commit cf5480e855ff2476c928b7ff7f4399c664ff70ea 기준이며, 로컬 HEAD 1cedf013a95b63af2a1fe9d07247ff0e69cf0115는 문서/의존성 후속 변경을 포함하지만 아직 production 배포 기준은 아니다.
Frontend shell, landing, system boot handoff, dashboard core metrics, AI sidebar open, and fullscreen AI assistant handoff are operational.
AI assistant is not fully green: overall server summary and network filter follow-up work, but the 24h peak-load prompt is a production QA failure.

The web-server-01 detail and action-needed clarification flows returned visible answers but showed generic response metadata, so grounding quality should be improved after the blocking 24h peak-load issue.
Browser console was clean: Total messages 0 (Errors: 0, Warnings: 0).
AI network evidence contained only 200/201 responses for the observed production flow.
